common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Smart Clinic account

landing.heroTitle: Book Your Consultation Online in Minutes
landing.heroSubtitle: An integrated system combining medical precision with technological ease. Connect with your favorite doctor from home safely and securely.

aboutDoctor.title: Dr. Ahmed Ali
aboutDoctor.bio: A pioneer in medical technology and digital healthcare delivery. Holder of the British Fellowship in Joint Surgery, he always strives to facilitate the patient experience through smart, innovative solutions that ensure quality and comfort.

landing.servicesSubtitle: We offer a complete suite of digital medical services designed to fit your modern lifestyle.

online.title: Online Consultation
online.desc: High-quality direct visual consultation with the doctor without needing to visit the clinic.

followup.title: Case Follow-up
followup.desc: Regular monitoring of your health status with continuous digital updates to your treatment plan.

prescription.title: E-Prescription
prescription.desc: Receive your medical prescription directly on your app with the option to send it to the pharmacy.

instant.title: Instant Consultation
instant.desc: For emergencies, connect with our medical team available 24/7.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and security.
profile.securityDesc: Keep your account safe with a strong password.
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.currentPasswordIncorrect: Current password is incorrect. Please try again.

dashboard.subtitle: Your health journey at a glance.
dashboard.scheduleConsultation: Stay on top of your health by scheduling a consultation.
dashboard.medicalRecordsDesc: Access prescriptions, visit summaries, and lab results.
dashboard.patientChatDesc: Message your clinic coordinator regarding your care.

medicalHistory.title: Medical History
medicalHistory.subtitle: Your clinical journey, sorted by date.
medicalHistory.noRecentRecordsDesc: No visits in the last 3 months.
medicalHistory.noRecordsFoundDesc: Your medical journey starts with your first consultation.

chat.selectProfessional: Select a health professional or provider to begin end-to-end encrypted communication.
chat.purgeMessage: This action will irreversibly erase the entire communication record of this secure channel.
